query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS site_settings (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `key` VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL UNIQUE,
  value TEXT,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
)
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user zuxFhcSmgfRMF3Y.5443ef0e52ed --database 7xKVuVPoe4TavcqcxPZkpC --execute CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS site_settings (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `key` VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL UNIQUE,
  value TEXT,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
)
